title: Creating new contacts when a phone call is received
excerpt:

posts.author: patrickfallon (Patrick Fallon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
A client who I have recommended Monday dot com to has asked about the ability to automatically (or with minimal clicking at least) create a new item/contact in Monday dot com when a phone call is received on mobile.
(They are currently using Hubspot and getting very frustrated at the fact that when they receive a phone call there is no option to create new contact easily in Hubspot. Instead, they have to copy the phone number then create a new contact and paste the number in).
I have never used Twilio myself but thought about this option, just wondering if anybody has a solution or suggestion?

Cheers,
Patrick
